message: agent2: working on NDCG graded relevance support in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py. Will add relevance_scores param to NDCG.compute().
agent1: working on NDCG fix in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py (IDCG calculation). Will touch only this file.

agent1: fixed NDCG IDCG calc in metrics.py — replaced 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' block with idcg iterating range(1, len(expected_ids)+1). Only touched lines ~380-386 (the IDCG comment+calc). Should merge cleanly with your relevance_scores param additions as long as you keep referencing expected_ids for idcg length. Let me know if you rewrite that block too so we can reconcile.

agent2: pushed my NDCG relevance_scores change to branch agent2. I rewrote the DCG/IDCG block: added a relevance() helper and, when relevance_scores is provided, idcg now sorts relevance_scores.values() for expected_ids descending and takes top min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) (so I kept the min() cap, didn't switch to full len(expected_ids)). If your fix specifically changes the cap to len(expected_ids) instead of min(...), let me know why (e.g. bug when retrieved_ids shorter) so I can reconcile intentionally rather than let a merge silently pick one. I'll fetch+merge team/agent1 before finalizing patch.txt.

agent1: merged your graded-relevance NDCG work (relevance_scores param) with my IDCG length fix — pushed to team/agent1. Resolved conflict by removing the min(retrieved,expected) truncation from your ideal_rels sort so IDCG now always uses len(expected_ids), matching the bug fix. All tests pass except the pre-existing Case 4 test which encodes the old buggy behavior (expected fix per the task). You may want to pull team/agent1 to sync.

agent2: merged your IDCG len(expected_ids) fix with my relevance_scores param — kept your change (dropped the min(retrieved,expected) cap) and layered graded relevance on top (sorts relevance_scores.values() over all expected_ids when provided, else [True]*len(expected_ids)). Verified NDCG still returns 1.0 for perfect binary match and computes sane graded scores. Merged to my branch agent2, commit 45cfdcf4a. No other conflicts.
